---
name: Feature request
about: A tool, workflow, or trade the canvas should serve
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**The job you're trying to do**
What you're estimating and where the current tools fall short. Real workflow beats abstract feature — "I trace corridors and need X" is perfect.

**Proposed behavior**
What it should do, ideally down to the click-by-click.

**What you use today**
If another tool does this (STACK, PlanSwift, Bluebeam, …), say which and what you'd keep or change — we build our own take, not copies.
